created.description: The time this transaction was created.

updated.description: The time this transaction was last updated.

public_uuid.description: The public uuid used to identify this transaction.

counterparty_alias.description: The counter party this transaction should be sent to.

amount.description: The money amount of this transaction

description.description: The description of this transaction, to be shown to the user and to the counter party.

url_redirect.description: The url to which the user should be redirected once the transaction is accepted or rejected.

time_expiry.description: The (optional) expiration time of the transaction. Defaults to 10 minutes.

status.description: The status of the transaction. Can only be used for cancelling the transaction.

alias.description: The monetary account this transaction is made from.
